positive: A whimsical, symmetrical, abstract design featuring stylized mountain ranges and floating celestial bodies. The mountains should have clean, sharp silhouettes rendered in deep sapphire blue, slate gray, and muted gold. Integrate constellations and geometric line work that connect the elements, suggesting a dreamy, ethereal atmosphere. The overall composition must be centered and suitable for a repeating print pattern, utilizing negative space effectively. Style: Minimalist illustration, clean vector art aesthetic, high contrast, and depth. Lighting: Even, flat, studio illumination, emphasizing crisp lines and solid color blocks. Color Palette: Limited to deep blues, grays, cream, and metallic gold accents.
negative: photo, realistic, messy, blurry, low contrast, gradient, text, logo, signature, watermark, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, noise
